tools.name: get_account_plan
tools.description: Return the account plan, renewal date, and active seats for a workspace ID.

workspace_id.description: Workspace identifier from the internal CRM.

tools.name: list_recent_invoices
tools.description: List the latest invoices and payment state for a customer account.

account_id.description: Account ID used by the billing service.

limit.description: Maximum number of invoices to return.

tools.name: get_webhook_delivery_log
tools.description: Fetch recent webhook delivery attempts, retries, and HTTP status codes.
